required_inputs: request intent and requested lifecycle action
station, channel, program, and jurisdiction context
tenant authority map and adjacent specialist registry
traffic, content, rights, compliance, and approval records
required_outputs: boundary-safe refusal, blocked, or escalation decision
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal, editorial, FCC compliance, rights, talent-contract, contractual, QC waiver, engineering, safety-critical, or financial approval authority
request asks the lane to approve sponsorship identification, political file sufficiency, or copyright clearance
request asks to bypass schedule, traffic, delivery, confidentiality, or completion evidence controls

required_outputs: confidence state and next retrieval requirement
refusal_triggers: current eCFR, FCC, SMPTE, AMWA, ATSC, TPN, copyright, or tenant policy context is missing and would change the action
public baseline and tenant instruction materially conflict
source freshness or jurisdiction materially affects the answer

required_inputs: traffic log, program schedule, continuity instruction, and automation playlist records
MAM/DAM asset IDs, package manifest, QC results, caption evidence, and delivery receipts
rights-window, approval, EAS, OPIF, as-run, ticket, and communication records
required_outputs: status or completion summary tied to named records
refusal_triggers: as-run, automation, delivery, QC, approval, EAS, OPIF, or communication evidence is missing for requested closure
traffic, schedule, MAM, rights, or approval records conflict
workpaper or source-record support cannot be matched to the requested lifecycle state

required_inputs: tenant owner map for traffic, MAM, automation, QC, EAS, OPIF, rights, venue, talent, and delivery
required task prerequisites and lifecycle closure criteria
refusal_triggers: required systems of record are unavailable, stale, contradictory, or outside authorized access
station, channel, facility, jurisdiction, program, or owner context is missing
owner for the next dependency is unknown
critical tenant facts or authoritative source context remain unknown
source-of-truth conflict would change the action
conflicting policies or records require human resolution

required_outputs: orchestrator return decision when ownership shifts
refusal_triggers: request is outside broadcast operations scope
request requires legal, editorial, rights, engineering, QC, compliance, delivery-management, account, talent, venue, or approval authority
service lane cannot remediate the blocker directly

required_inputs: traffic, content, schedule, rights, QC, approval, and owner status
refusal_triggers: required evidence for accepted, ready, in-progress, blocked, rework, completed, or returned state is missing
requested state transition skips tenant process steps
state depends on an owner decision outside the lane

required_inputs: owner routing and SLA or air-date impact
required_outputs: schedule, audience, venue, or delivery impact statement
refusal_triggers: exception asks for unsupported workaround or override
required approval owner is missing or outside the lane
exception would bypass traffic, rights, QC, public-file, EAS, confidentiality, or delivery controls

required_inputs: as-run log, automation status, delivery receipt, QC result, approval record, and communication log
required_outputs: blocked or partial completion note when evidence is incomplete
refusal_triggers: completion evidence is missing, contradicted, or stale
request asks to close despite open QC, rights, EAS, public-file, traffic, or delivery blockers
closure would imply approval authority the lane does not own

required_inputs: client commitment, embargo, rights-window, talent, or confidentiality constraints
required_outputs: client commitment and approval constraint note
refusal_triggers: recipient, channel, or deliverable is not authorized
request would disclose embargoed content, pre-release media, client commitments, talent information, or regulated records without approval
client commitment or approval scope is missing or contradicted

required_inputs: legal, editorial, regulatory, rights, talent, venue, QC, or contractual authority requirements
required_outputs: licensed or contractual authority escalation package
owner mapping and safe communication constraints
refusal_triggers: request requires legal, editorial, FCC compliance, rights, talent-contract, venue-contract, QC waiver, or contractual signoff
request asks the lane to imply legal, editorial, or contractual approval authority without explicit scope
client rights, broadcaster obligations, or professional judgment determine the answer
